entries.summary: Revision-5 coordinated client cutover: require marketplace SDK ^0.12.0 and React ^0.5.0, bind the exact normalized per-task job-spec hash in every funded hire before the activation host is contacted, widen store-core's peers to the hardened wire, scaffold only the revision-5-compatible package set, publish surfaceRevision 5 through the upgrade feed, and force patched PostCSS 8.5.x across generated Next.js stores. This is a flag-day compatibility release; older transaction builders fail closed after the program upgrade.

store-core: §12 roster-trust consumption rail — new OPT-IN moderation.trustPolicy config ("edge-list" default = today's exact behavior; "any-bonded-attestor" = a consumable ListingModeration record by ANY registered, non-exiting on-chain roster ModerationAttestor makes a listing hireable here, so cross-node supply attested by another marketplace's attestor is hireable without re-attestation). Wired END-TO-END: HireActivationButton resolves the hire moderator per-listing (GET ?listing=<pda>), all three template activation routes pass the resolver, and resolveActivationBackend builds it with zero configuration. The resolver mirrors the program's full hire-gate pipeline: the §5.2 moderation-block floor (unconditional, never relaxed — a blocked hash never resolves and never pays for an acquisition), the record checks (status CLEAN/HUMAN_APPROVED, risk bound, unexpired — a record that merely EXISTS is never named), the global moderation authority as a first-class candidate (incl. all legacy records), per-hit unlockability (author = authority or a live non-exiting roster entry), and the P1.3 liveness deadman / disabled gate (relaxed → listing-agnostic moderator, no acquisition). Hardened: own-set discovery runs before any roster read and a roster over MAX_ROSTER_ATTESTORS=512 degrades (own records keep hiring, acquisition disabled, loud warning) instead of 502ing the network; acquisition is single-flighted per listing with a short negative-result TTL and gated on the store's own catalog/curation; the rate-limiter key is no longer first-hop-XFF spoofable and the limiter map is memory-bounded. Transient RPC errors propagate and never trigger a paid acquisition. Additive; the on-chain gates remain the enforcement point. NOTE: the legacy agenc.agent-card/v1 read-compat removal previously slated for 0.6.0 is deferred to 0.7.0 (this release keeps the read path).

store-core: WP-F4 unified agent-card schema — the agenc.agentCard.v1 JSON Schema is vendored at schemas/ (byte-identical to the copy served at https://agenc.ag/schemas/agenc.agentCard.v1.json, fixture-guarded) and shipped in the npm tarball; new parseAgentCard() accepts the legacy agenc.agent-card/v1 id on READ through 0.5.x (up-converted, always re-emits the unified id; removal documented for 0.6.0 per the versioning contract). Additive — emitted cards unchanged.

store-core: point the default marketplace-managed task-moderation attestor at the open WP-C1 service (https://attest.agenc.ag/api/task-moderation/attest) instead of the entitlement-gated marketplace.agenc.tech route, so a template-scaffolded store's hire→activation reaches moderation with zero configuration and no kit-entitlement headers. Sovereignty override (moderation.attestorEndpoint) unchanged. NOTE: the hosted endpoint records on-chain attestations once its signer key is provisioned; until then it returns clean verdicts with attested=false.

A1 client cutover (breaking against the pre-A1 program): pin sdk ^0.7.0 / react ^0.3.0 across store-core, all three templates, and the create-agenc-store scaffold output. The 2026-07-02 mainnet upgrade (WP-A1 roster moderation gates) added an optional moderation_attestor account to set_task_job_spec / hire_from_listing / hire_from_listing_humanless; stores built on sdk 0.6.x / react 0.2.x are rejected fail-closed by the deployed program on publish/hire — scaffold or upgrade to 0.3.0 immediately. No template or store-core source changes; pins, docs, and versions only.

Current-packages release (WP-B1): sdk ^0.6.1 / react ^0.2.0 pins (0.3.0 encodings are rejected by the deployed program — bump immediately); post-hire activation wired into the hire flow (useHumanlessHireFlow + the store activation route, zero moderation config); provider-level referrer injection (settlement live); operator terms on listing creation; agent-card unified to agenc.agentCard.v1; mainnet gate re-copy + go-live checklist. Review hardening: a hire is recorded the moment it lands and every retry surface (modal Confirm, inline panel, dashboard TaskActivationRepair) re-runs ONLY activation against the existing task — an activation failure can no longer strand a funded escrow invisibly or double-charge on retry; the activation route verifies the task on-chain, rate-limits, and caps hosted specs; serverless deploys fail job-spec hosting loudly with an actionable error (AGENC_JOB_SPEC_DIR override; job-spec-hosting go-live check).
Initial store-core: config schema (defineStore), SEO helpers, shared page sections, instance-upgrade primitives, and the local sandbox bootstrap.
